name: meta-cc
description: Meta-cognition tools for Claude Code and Codex: session history analysis, workflow optimization, and prompt library workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze agent sessions and reuse prompt-library workflows.
interface.longDescription: meta-cc provides MCP tools for local session analysis and Codex skills for searching, listing, and viewing saved prompts in .meta-cc/prompts/library/.
defaultPrompt: Show my recent tool usage patterns.
Search my saved prompts for refactoring.
List my prompt library by usage.
